message:
Add improved error diagnostics for sprout-internal tool failures

- Split executeInternalTool into separate import/runtime error handling
- Add extractLineFromStack, getSourceContext, formatImportError, formatRuntimeError helpers
- Check for missing default export with clear error message
- Import errors include tool name and source context around error line
- Runtime errors include cleaned stack traces (temp paths replaced with original)
- Temp file still cleaned up in finally block
- All existing tests pass; 11 new tests added
